sutta: once while the exalted 1 dwelled at sabahti in an eastern part at the terrorist house of megara's mother visakha visited him and the exalted 1 said to her endowed with 4 qualities visakha women folk win power in this world this world is in their grasp with with what for here in visakha a woman is capable at her world she manages the servants in her ways she is lovely to her husband she guards his wealth and how visaka is a woman capable at her work whatever her husband's home industries whether in wool or cotton therein she is deft and nimble gifted with an inquiring turn of mind into all such undertakings she is able to arrange and carry them out in this way a woman is capable at her work and how does she manage the servants whatever her husband's household consists of slaves messengers or workforce she knows the work of each by what has been done she knows their remissness by what has not been done she knows the strength and weakness of the sick she divides the heart and soft food each according to his share in this way she manages the servants and how is she lovely to in her ways to her husband what her husband reckons to be unlovely that she would not commit for very life's sake thus she is lovely in her ways to her husband and how does she guard his wealth whatever money corn silver or gold her husband brings home she keeps it secure by watching ward and of it she is no rubber thief squanderer or waster in this way she guards his wealth and out with these 4 qualities visakha women folk win power in this world this world is in their grasp endowed with 4 qualities visakha women folk win power in the next world the next world is in their grasp with what for here in visakha a woman is accomplished in faith virtue charity and wisdom and how has she accomplished in faith she has faith and believes in the awakening of the tathagata thinking of the truth easily exalted 1 arahan buddha endowed with knowledge and practice welfare world know incomparable tamer of tameable men teacher of devas and men exalted 1 such is her faith and how she accomplished in virtue she abstains from taking life from stealing from the lusts of the flesh from lying and from drinking liquor the cause of sloth such is her virtue and how is she accomplished in charity she dwells at home with heart purged of the stain of everest given over to charity open handed delighting and giving you made to asking she finds joy in arms giving such is her charity and how is she accomplished in wisdom she is wise and is endowed with wisdom into the way of the rise and fall of things with aryan penetration of the way to the utter destruction of dukkha or evil such is her wisdom and now these 4 qualities visaka women folk win power in the next world the next world is in their grasp that's the end of the suta
commentary:
so in this utah we hear about 4 qualities where women win power in this world and 4 qualities where women win power in the next world and the last 1 is more important [Music] to win power in the next world and to get power in the next world 4 things are important to have faith in the buddha dharma and sangha to have virtue that means to keep the precepts to be charitable and to have wisdom these are the 4 important things
